programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop
programme.desc: Richard Hammond invites you behind the scenes of his workshop specializing in the restoration of classic cars.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: The competitors' task is to create a chain of correct answers.After each round, one person considered to be the weakest link is eliminated.The pressure increases with every passing minute.Hosted by Romesh Ranganathan.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire With Jeremy Clarkson
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson returns with new episodes of the popular game show.Each participant has a chance to win one million pounds.He is 15 questions away from winning.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In the 18th series of the program, just like before: many amazing feats, crazy challenges, special reports and a sense of humor.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In the 18th series of the program, just like before: many amazing feats, crazy challenges, special reports and a sense of humor.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In the 18th series of the program, just like before: many amazing feats, crazy challenges, special reports and a sense of humor.

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: France, the years of World War II.The owner of a small provincial cafe, René Artois, experiences funny adventures among his family, friends and Nazi officials tracking the resistance movement.

credits.actor: pułkownik Kurt von Strohm - Richard Marner
Madame Fanny La Fan/Leclerc - Rose Hill

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: A cult series set during World War II in France.

credits.actor: pułkownik Kurt von Strohm - Richard Marner
Madame Fanny La Fan/Leclerc - Rose Hill

programme.title: Secrets of the Spy Whale
programme.desc: In April 2019, a tamed whale approached the boats of Norwegian fishermen wearing a camera-mounting harness marked "Equipment of St. Petersburg".This has sparked speculation that the Arctic beluga may have been trained by the Russian Navy for espionage duties.The creators of the program discover the secrets of the whale.They ask where he came from, who trained him and what he was doing in this part of the Arctic.They also discuss the behind-the-scenes of the secret world of using marine mammals for international espionage and present Hvaldimir's true identity.

programme.title: Secrets of the Spy Whale
programme.desc: In April 2019, a tamed whale approached the boats of Norwegian fishermen wearing a camera-mounting harness marked "Equipment of St. Petersburg".This has sparked speculation that the Arctic beluga may have been trained by the Russian Navy for espionage duties.The creators of the program discover the secrets of the whale.They ask where he came from, who trained him and what he was doing in this part of the Arctic.They also discuss the behind-the-scenes of the secret world of using marine mammals for international espionage and present Hvaldimir's true identity.

programme.title: Icons of Auto
programme.desc: Stories of famous automotive brands.Their logos are recognizable on every continent, and subsequent car models are desired by collectors.We will get to know five iconic models of each brand.

programme.title: Icons of Auto
programme.desc: Stories of famous automotive brands.Their logos are recognizable on every continent, and subsequent car models are desired by collectors.We will get to know five iconic models of each brand.

programme.title: Top Gear: Patagonia Special
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set off on a unique journey to Patagonia.They will travel over 2.5 thousand kilometers to reach the southernmost city in the world.

programme.title: Top Gear: Patagonia Special
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set off on a unique journey to Patagonia.They will travel over 2.5 thousand kilometers to reach the southernmost city in the world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Spy Whale
programme.desc: In April 2019, a tamed whale approached the boats of Norwegian fishermen wearing a camera-mounting harness marked "Equipment of St. Petersburg".This has sparked speculation that the Arctic beluga may have been trained by the Russian Navy for espionage duties.The creators of the program discover the secrets of the whale.They ask where he came from, who trained him and what he was doing in this part of the Arctic.They also discuss the behind-the-scenes of the secret world of using marine mammals for international espionage and present Hvaldimir's true identity.

programme.title: Secrets of the Spy Whale
programme.desc: In April 2019, a tamed whale approached the boats of Norwegian fishermen wearing a camera-mounting harness marked "Equipment of St. Petersburg".This has sparked speculation that the Arctic beluga may have been trained by the Russian Navy for espionage duties.The creators of the program discover the secrets of the whale.They ask where he came from, who trained him and what he was doing in this part of the Arctic.They also discuss the behind-the-scenes of the secret world of using marine mammals for international espionage and present Hvaldimir's true identity.

programme.title: Icons of Auto
programme.desc: Stories of famous automotive brands.Their logos are recognizable on every continent, and subsequent car models are desired by collectors.We will get to know five iconic models of each brand.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: A series devoted to the greatest engineering disasters in the history of mankind.Chernobyl, Titanic and Hinderburg - these are examples of bold technological experiments that ended tragically.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: A series devoted to the greatest engineering disasters in the history of mankind.Chernobyl, Titanic and Hinderburg - these are examples of bold technological experiments that ended tragically.

programme.title: Qatar: State of Fear
programme.desc: A program presenting the shocking experiences of discrimination, persecution and imprisonment by the Qatari authorities during the organization of the 2022 FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: Afghanistan: No Country for Women
programme.desc: Ramita Navai, an award-winning correspondent, reveals the realities of women's lives under the Taliban.He secretly films in prison where women are held without trial or even prosecution, and whose fate is unknown to their families.He discovers frequent cases of forced marriage of young girls.She meets activists from an underground network of activists who, during extremely dangerous missions, save women pursued by the Taliban.He also joins the protest, which is broken up by security forces.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: A series devoted to the greatest engineering disasters in the history of mankind.Chernobyl, Titanic and Hinderburg - these are examples of bold technological experiments that ended tragically.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: Atomic clocks, airport vehicles, large heavy-duty monsters, humanoid robots, a jet-powered suit - these are just some of the innovative machines, structures and vehicles presented by Tony Robinson.Actor known, among others,from the cult series "Blackadder" travels around the world in pursuit of these fantastic inventions and talks to the scientists and engineers who created them. He visits factories, workshops and laboratories to learn the principles of operation and look at the work of machines that perform necessary and extremely difficult tasks, and whose existence we are often unaware of.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: Atomic clocks, airport vehicles, large heavy-duty monsters, humanoid robots, a jet-powered suit - these are just some of the innovative machines, structures and vehicles presented by Tony Robinson.Actor known, among others,from the cult series "Blackadder" travels around the world in pursuit of these fantastic inventions and talks to the scientists and engineers who created them. He visits factories, workshops and laboratories to learn the principles of operation and look at the work of machines that perform necessary and extremely difficult tasks, and whose existence we are often unaware of.

programme.title: Top Gear's Ambitious But Rubbish
programme.desc: The program recalls the greatest challenges and failures from 21 seasons of 'Top Gear', including:rail cars, a flying hearse, an electric hammerhead eagle-i thrust car and a hovercraft van.

programme.title: Top Gear's Ambitious But Rubbish
programme.desc: The program recalls the greatest challenges and failures from 21 seasons of 'Top Gear', including:rail cars, a flying hearse, an electric hammerhead eagle-i thrust car and a hovercraft van.

programme.title: Top Gear: From A-Z
programme.desc: The most interesting moments of the program from subsequent seasons until 2015.The presenter is played by one of the former "Top Gear" guests.

programme.title: Top Gear: From A-Z
programme.desc: The most interesting moments of the program from subsequent seasons until 2015.The presenter is played by one of the former "Top Gear" guests.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: Atomic clocks, airport vehicles, large heavy-duty monsters, humanoid robots, a jet-powered suit - these are just some of the innovative machines, structures and vehicles presented by Tony Robinson.Actor known, among others,from the cult series "Blackadder" travels around the world in pursuit of these fantastic inventions and talks to the scientists and engineers who created them. He visits factories, workshops and laboratories to learn the principles of operation and look at the work of machines that perform necessary and extremely difficult tasks, and whose existence we are often unaware of.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: Atomic clocks, airport vehicles, large heavy-duty monsters, humanoid robots, a jet-powered suit - these are just some of the innovative machines, structures and vehicles presented by Tony Robinson.Actor known, among others,from the cult series "Blackadder" travels around the world in pursuit of these fantastic inventions and talks to the scientists and engineers who created them. He visits factories, workshops and laboratories to learn the principles of operation and look at the work of machines that perform necessary and extremely difficult tasks, and whose existence we are often unaware of.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Legends still circulate about the Bermuda Triangle.This is one of the most famous and unknown areas on the planet.For years, it has been associated with the inexplicable disappearance of ships and planes that appear in a 500-square-mile stretch of the Atlantic Ocean.Researchers are constantly exploring this mystery, creating probable and paranormal theories.In a three-episode series, the creators will analyze the causes of the secret disappearances of aircraft and ships.Perhaps this is due to human errors, unfavorable weather conditions or the appearance of UFOs.
